description: Ukraine can still receive MiG-29 fighters from Poland Defense Minister Vladyslav Kosyniak-Kamysh said that the question still remains open. According to him, Warsaw is considering Kyiv's request: "Such a possibility is realistic, but it should be an exchange, not just a one-way transfer from Poland." We are talking about the transfer of Ukrainian drone technologies in exchange for aircraft. Earlier...
description_en: Ukraine can still receive MiG-29 fighters from Poland Defense Minister Vladyslav Kosyniak-Kamysh said that the question still remains open. According to him, Warsaw is considering Kyiv's request: "Such a possibility is realistic, but it should be an exchange, not just a one-way transfer from Poland." We are talking about the transfer of Ukrainian drone technologies in exchange for aircraft. Earlier...
description_uk: Украина все же может получить от Польши истребители МиГ-29 Министр обороны Владислав Косиняк-Камыш заявил, что вопрос все еще остается открытым. По его словам, Варшава рассматривает запрос Киева: «Такая возможность реалистична, но это должен быть именно обмен, а не просто односторонняя передача со стороны Польши». title: Airstrike attack
description: Russia is preparing to launch another massive combined strike against Ukraine already this week, monitors report. Earlier, the speaker of the Air Force Ignat said that the Russian Federation is ready for a new massive strike, it could happen at least tomorrow.

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Update: Death toll rises to 11 following Russia’s massive attack on Kyiv, region. The number of people killed in Russia’s overnight missile and drone attack has risen to 11, local authorities reported on July 6, after emergency crews recovered more victims from the rubble of struck residential buildings. At least 46 others have been reported injured across the capital and the surrounding region.
description_en: Update: Death toll rises to 11 following Russia’s massive attack on Kyiv, region. The number of people killed in Russia’s overnight missile and drone attack has risen to 11, local authorities reported on July 6, after emergency crews recovered more victims from the rubble of struck residential buildings. At least 46 others have been reported injured across the capital and the surrounding region.
description_uk: Update: Death toll rises to 11 following Russia’s massive attack on Kyiv, region. The number of people killed in Russia’s overnight missile and drone attack has risen to 11, local authorities reported on July 6, after emergency crews recovered more victims from the rubble of struck residential buildings. At least 46 others have been reported injured across the capital and the surrounding region.

title: Donetsk: 37 missiles intercepted
description: 363 TARGETS DESTROYED/SUPPRESSED: 37 MISSILES AND 326 ENEMY UAVs On the night of July 6 (from 18:00 on July 5), the enemy launched a massive combined attack on Ukraine using attack UAVs, air-, land-, and sea-based missiles of various types. ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. A total of 419 means of air attack - 68 missiles and 351 unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) were recorded by the Air Force's radio engineering troops...

Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано 419 засобів повітряного нападу – 68 ракет і 351 БпЛА...

description: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥 Minister of Defense of Poland Władysław Kosiniak-Kamysh instructed to declassify data on military aid to Ukraine for the years 2022-2026. The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...

The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...
description_uk: 🇵🇱 Польща розсекретить дані про всю військову допомогу Україні 👥 Міністр оборони Польщі Владислав Косіняк-Камиш доручив розсекретити дані про військову допомогу Україні за 2022–2026 роки. Рішення ухвалене після консультації з прем’єр-міністром Дональдом Туском. Крім того, польська Служба військової контррозвідки (SKW) розслідуватиме розкриття державної таємниці. 🖋 Процес передачі техніки Україні...

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Spoke with the Prime Minister of Sweden. I am grateful to Ulf for his support and for a clear position regarding the Russian war against Ukraine, against our people. The key is, of course, air defense. Now we can see that the Russians are betting on ballistic strikes, combined strikes, jet "shahedis". Defending against this is the key to denying Russia the ability to drag out the war. Of course, we talked with Ulf about things that can...
description_en: Spoke with the Prime Minister of Sweden. I am grateful to Ulf for his support and for a clear position regarding the Russian war against Ukraine, against our people. The key is, of course, air defense. Now we can see that the Russians are betting on ballistic strikes, combined strikes, jet "shahedis". Defending against this is the key to denying Russia the ability to drag out the war. Of course, we talked with Ulf about things that can...
description_uk: Говорив з Премʼєр-міністром Швеції. Вдячний Ульфу за підтримку і за чітку позицію щодо російської війни проти України, проти наших людей. Ключове – це, звісно, ППО. Зараз ми бачимо, що росіяни роблять ставку на удари балістикою, комбіновані удари, реактивні «шахеди». Захист від цього – це ключ, щоб позбавити Росію можливості затягувати війну. Звісно, ми проговорили з Ульфом речі, які можна...
